descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: characteristic length scale of crystalline grains
descriptors.rationale: critical for mechanical and electrical properties

quality.loss_reason: full distribution reduced to mean only
quality.notes: ignores variance, skewness, and distribution shape

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: crystallographic angle between adjacent grain orientations
descriptors.rationale: determines boundary energy and material behavior

quality.loss_reason: continuous distribution binned into discrete histogram
quality.notes: loses exact angles but preserves distribution shape

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: ratio of longest to shortest grain dimension
descriptors.rationale: indicates grain elongation and deformation history

representation.encoding: positive real greater than or equal one

quality.loss_reason: averages over all grains, loses spatial information

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.physical_meaning: degree of preferred crystallographic orientation alignment
descriptors.rationale: affects anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

quality.loss_reason: reduces full orientation distribution to single number
quality.notes: different texture types yield same intensity value

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: influences diffusion, strength, and deformation mechanisms

quality.notes: redundant with grain size for uniform microstructures
